---
title: "Progress report week 3"
author: "Victoria Sjalim"
date: "2026-06-23"
execute: 
  freeze: auto
---

# Analysing Minimap through mappy
Which modules has mappy:

- ```Alignment.py```
- ```Pipeline.py```
- ```io.py```

Which modules inherited the mappy:

- ```graph.py```
- ```interval.py```
